title: Tell me about a time you had to deal with coworker.
description:
Behavioral Interview Question: Tell me about a time you had to deal with coworker.

**STAR Method Guidelines:**
- **Situation:** Set the scene and provide necessary context.
- **Task:** Describe what your responsibility was in that situation.
- **Action:** Explain exactly what steps you took to address the situation.
- **Result:** Share what outcomes your actions achieved.
hints: Focus on your specific actions regarding coworker.
Use the STAR method to structure your answer.
Highlight what you learned from this experience.
